series_metadata.series_description: Records of recipient, applicants and subrecipients to include: applications, funding and closeout documents. Financial and programmatic reports and supporting internal grant management records. Training documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain three (3) years from the date of the submission of the final FFR, or when final action is taken to resolve any claim, audit, or investigation involving the grant. Or as otherwise specified in grant terms and conditions, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain three (3) years from the date of the submission of the final FFR, or when final action is taken to resolve any claim, audit, or investigation involving the grant. Or as otherwise specified in grant terms and conditions, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
